market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape the city chaos in our luxury Emerald suite, a tranquil oasis that sleeps 4. Our stylish, cosy apartment is the perfect base for exploring everything [city name] has to offer. Guests praise our spotless, well-appointed space and convenient central location. Enjoy [average nightly review mentions, e.g.] "great location", "super comfy beds", and "friendly hosts" (review count). We provide everything you need for a comfortable stay, and are just a short walk from [points of interest].
analysis.photo_order_rec: Feature the living room as the cover photo, showcasing the apartment's stylish decor and comfortable seating area.
key_diagnosis: Your £74.4 rate is -57% vs the cohort median of £175.00, indicating a significant pricing gap that may be deterring bookings. Consider revising your rate to stay competitive.
Your occupancy is 21.7% booked for the next 90 days, far below the cohort median of 28.3%. Focus on optimising your listing for occupancy through targeted messaging and imagery.
As a 0-year seasoned host without a verified average rating, credibility and trust with potential guests may be a concern, consider earning your superhost badge
analysis.outreach_hook: Given your occupancy is only 21.7% booked, with a significant pricing gap, there's a clear opportunity to boost income and fill dates more consistently.
